warnings: One of 3 distinct views on sheet A-15; siblings are _view1_fixture_symbol_schedule.json and _view3_mount_height_schedule.json.

This 1:20 detail shows a standard bathroom concrete counter (มาตรฐานเคาน์เตอร์ ค.ส.ล) construction section — granite-clad concrete counter top over a light steel-mesh-reinforced slab, with a mirror mounted on plywood backing above, standing on a plastered wall base; floor finish note 'พื้นภายในห้องน้ำ' at the bottom.
This generic counter detail is the shared construction standard referenced by both WC.1 (LAV.1, ground floor) and WC.2 (LAV.1, upper floor) — see _หน้า18_wc_plan.json and the WC section sheets.
